title: Journey's End Plushies
description: Resource-pack that let's players use/have plushies :]
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/580047a0980a7da16e027a1b5f4d4bcb8259a8bd.png) A Funny Resource Pack That Lets Players Have Little Plushies In-game.\ I Will Try Updating This Once A Week With New Plushies :] Just Download It, Load It, And Have Fun! ## • CIT REQUIRED Click On The Image To Go To The Mod Page! ![FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43bbedb9b52b090d5405c33a4e7347a78452050.png) ## • How To Use It? > Click **Download**, Select the version of minecraft you use, Then you need to open your **Minecraft Options > Resource Packs > Open Pack Folder.** And then you throw the entire **ZIP file** into the folder and you toggle the resourcepack on. ## • How Do I Become A Plushie? > Click The Image Below To Open A Forum That You Fill Out And I'll Get You Your Plushie. ## • Does The Resource pack Update Itself? > No, the resource pack doesn't update itself you will need to redownload it through the page. ## • How Do I Make / Get A Plushie? > You need to grab a piece of **White Wool** and rename it to any of the plushie names from the list provided below using the command **/item name (Character Name) Plushie**.\ > For Example: ```/item name F2 Plushie``` ![Plushie List](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1432588adb21667765e9ba876e149bbc78740186.png) ## There Is 97 Plushies In The Resourcepack.
Version 1 ![Plushie Version 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15d257c0123ca94e2853a062d289bf821c125e1d.png) | WingedBlue Plushie | 1SleepyPrince Plushie | Witchxry Plushie | Lemon Moth Plushie | KTruff Plushie | CalumCC Plushie | Michiko Plushie | F2 Plushie ![v1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h1yMWufj/images/2cd1753eec69a31255f0efc70089759b877e50f8.png)
Version 2 ![Plushie Version 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6bf49be99c9ab8d6759f76fc193ab2e6c05d2ce.png) | Willson Plushie | Doll Plushie | Izu Takahashi Plushie | Shaun Riggs Plushie | Emis Treasure Plushie | Humboldt Plushie | Chrissintra Freval Plushie | Ferris Plushie | Martin Plushie | Hollis Hotcake Plushie | Ardian Plushie | Nori Plushie | Ai Plushie | Zentra Geuldy Plushie | Crustania Plushie | Kumi Plushie | Ophiel Plushie | Squiggle Plushie | Roza Faith Plushie | Nyra Plushie | Niki C Brangwen Plushie | Eliot Plushie | Rimba Plushie | Edgar Hayes Plushie | Honey Plushie | Mizuki Plushie | Oscar Valeryon Plushie | Lucien Plushie | Asta Plushie | Charlotte Plushie | Sculk Plushie | Akumo Modesto Plushie | Syn Plushie | Lin Waterdew Plushie | Mazikeen Plushie | Kvass Plushie | Aurora Plushie | Raymond Plushie | Lost Puppy Plushie ![v2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h1yMWufj/images/d136dc2126180ec200ac823c925d2fcee6887c59.jpeg)
Version 3 ![Plushie Version 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b57f342e9266f591955fb25f81cd0f68328d01fd.png) | Kamaria Plushie | Everett Plushie | Rhea Plushie | Issac Plushie | Xenia Plushie | Valentine Plushie | Beatrix Plushie | Amaris Plushie | Cygnus Plushie | Sune Plushie | Astro Plushie | Frederick Plushie | Rendell Plushie | Astrel Plushie | Clovis Plushie | Greed Plushie ![v3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h1yMWufj/images/40b043033fb64f10882c2e3f0bb117b4926275c1.png)
Version 4 ![Plushie Version 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4eed10144f6eaf152a2f7904910cfd132e9dcfa.png) | Othello Plushie | Simon Plushie | Fable Plushie | Samemi Plushie | Tempest Plushie | Gale Plushie | Shogun Orc Plushie | Valeria Plushie | Cherie Plushie | Foxglove Plushie | Uni Clown Plushie | Sylv Plushie | Wren Jacket Plushie | Wren Plushie | Izora Plushie | Ezra Baker Plushie | Axel Adicus Plushie | Axel Traveler Plushie | Arinjay Plushie | Nyxen Plushie ![v4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h1yMWufj/images/824db5e70e2ff7c0dae81cac31945f945353b6d6.jpeg)
Version 5 ![Plushie Version 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5797e005fe1ffafd4eefcbc8bc618b6c99465c7a.png) | Xryuiji Plushie | Doctor M Plushie | CC Plushie | Raine Plushie | Warren Plushie | Merikh Plushie | Emmet Plushie | Yki Plushie | Snoozy Plushie | Seth Plushie | Nyxian Plushie | Reaper Plushie | Arthur Stewart Plushie | Jesty Plushie ![v5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h1yMWufj/images/70fd933c9f31f3ba000e8f01c6b1f65c7be33110.jpeg)
A Nice And Silly Resourcepack With Cool Plushies.
